title: escaped parameter no more supported
body:
---


Author Name: **Fabrizio Ferrandi**
Original Redmine Issue: 713 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-02-13


---

The attached tar.gz includes a testcase in the VERILATOR format.
The problem is mainly on an input parameter named \parameter. This Verilog comes from an automatic synthesis tool that translates from C to Verilog (http://panda.dei.polimi.it). The solution we adopt for C identifier translated in Verilog keywords is to escape them. This works with others simulators but not with Verilator.
Please run with 
t/t_escaped_parameter.pl --iv
that correctly simulates
and with 
t/t_escaped_parameter.pl --debug
that gave:
%Error: t/t_escaped_parameter.v:1620: Unknown escape sequence: \p
%Error: t/t_escaped_parameter.v:1732: Unknown escape sequence: \p
